title: lithocarpus longipes
intro: Lithocarpus longipes, also known as the long-beaked Lithocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree native to the mountainous regions of China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Lithocarpus longipes include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Lithocarpus longipes is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
